attic_key.name: Brass Key
attic_key.description: An old brass key labeled 'ATTIC.' Hidden inside the library globe.

jewelry_key.name: Tiny Brass Key
jewelry_key.description: A tiny brass key with a heart-shaped bow. Found beneath the crypt flagstone.

cellar_key.name: Iron Key
cellar_key.description: A small iron key. Found behind the portrait in the carriage house.

gate_key.name: Iron Gate Key
gate_key.description: An iron key, warm to the touch. Found in the greenhouse pot.

hidden_key.name: Tarnished Key
hidden_key.description: A tarnished key found inside the porcelain doll's hollow body.

binding_book.name: Rituals of Binding
binding_book.description: An occult text describing how to trap a spirit using a doll as vessel.

mothers_confession.name: Lady Ashworth's Confession
mothers_confession.description: A letter of guilt and admission, written December 23rd, 1891.

porcelain_doll.name: Elizabeth's Doll
porcelain_doll.description: A porcelain doll with cracked features. The vessel of the binding ritual.

elizabeths_locket.name: Silver Locket
elizabeths_locket.description: A tarnished silver locket inscribed 'Our Elizabeth, born in light.'

blessed_water.name: Vial of Holy Water
blessed_water.description: Water from the chapel baptismal font. Impossibly cold.

lock_of_hair.name: Lock of Hair
lock_of_hair.description: A tiny lock of golden hair tied with white ribbon. Found inside the locket.
